name: The Rooftop at Seaport
description: A stunning rooftop venue in Boston's Seaport district with panoramic harbor views. Perfect for startup mixers, networking events, and corporate gatherings.

name: Cambridge Innovation Loft
description: A modern industrial loft in Cambridge ideal for team dinners, demo days, and private dining experiences. Features exposed brick and high ceilings.

name: The Garden Terrace
description: An elegant garden terrace venue in Boston perfect for team celebrations, product launches, and intimate corporate events.

name: Downtown Conference Center
description: A large professional conference center in downtown Boston with state-of-the-art AV equipment. Ideal for large corporate events, conferences, and seminars.

name: The Speakeasy Lounge
description: An intimate speakeasy-style lounge in Cambridge perfect for private dinners, team celebrations, and exclusive gatherings under $120 per head.

name: Kendall Square Maker Space
description: An industrial-style maker space in Kendall Square with full AV support. Perfect for demo days, hackathons, and tech startup events.
